ddls:
CREATE TABLE "support_services_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "size_type_unknown" INTEGER /* Number of cases with unknown size/type */,
  "family_home" INTEGER /* Number of families in family homes */,
  "own_home" INTEGER /* Number of families in own homes */,
  "host_foster_family" INTEGER /* Number of families in host or foster family arrangements */,
  "group_1_6" INTEGER /* Number of recipients aged 1 to 6 years */,
  "group_7_15" INTEGER /* Number of recipients aged 7 to 15 years */,
  "group_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of recipients aged 16 years and older */,
  "ltss_recipients" INTEGER /* Total number of LTSS recipients */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County or municipality */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural designation */,
  "support_service_type" TEXT /* Type of support service provided (e.g., financial, counseling, housing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic trend entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of recipients (e.g., '1-6', '7-15', '16+')) */,
  "recipients_count" INTEGER /* Count of recipients within the specified age group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of recipients (e.g., 'White', 'Black', 'Hispanic') */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of recipients (e.g., 'Male', 'Female', 'Other') */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of recipients (e.g., 'Low', 'Middle', 'High') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County or municipality */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region", "county")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., '1-6', '7-15', '16+')) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the specified age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_service_types" (
  "support_service_type" TEXT /* Type of support service provided (e.g., financial, counseling, housing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_service_type")
)
